reason: All core tasks completed successfully: backup created (crm_backup_20260201.db), CRM copied to canonical location (N5/data/crm.db), is_internal column added. 3 of 5 internal team members were flagged in CRM (Logan, Ilse, Shivam). The other 2 (Vrijen, Ankit) do not exist in the CRM - they are in N5/data/profiles.db instead. The Drop correctly documented this finding and provided actionable recommendations.
concerns: Acceptance criterion '5 internal team members flagged' cannot be fully met because Vrijen Attawar and Ankit Mittal do not have entries in the CRM database - they exist only in N5/data/profiles.db. Architectural decision needed: either (a) add internal team to CRM for unified SSOT, or (b) treat profiles.db as internal team source of truth and CRM as external contacts only. This is a data architecture question for orchestrator, not a Drop failure.
